name: kapture
description: Control web browsers through the Model Context Protocol using Chrome DevTools
long_description:
Kapture is a powerful browser automation tool that enables AI assistants like Claude to control web browsers through a Chrome DevTools extension. It provides a seamless bridge between MCP clients and browser automation, allowing you to navigate pages, interact with elements, capture screenshots, and extract information from websites.

Key features:
- Navigate and control browser tabs
- Click, hover, and interact with page elements
- Fill forms and input fields
- Capture screenshots of pages or specific elements
- Extract DOM content and query elements
- Monitor console logs in real-time
- Support for multiple simultaneous browser connections

tools.name: tab_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific tab

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate browser tab to specified URL

tools.name: show
tools.description: Bring the browser tab to the front and focus it

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click on a page element using CSS selector or XPath

tools.name: focus
tools.description: Set focus on a page element

tools.name: blur
tools.description: Remove focus from a page element

tools.name: fill
tools.description: Fill an input field with a value

tools.name: select
tools.description: Select an option from a dropdown

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture screenshots of the page or specific elements

tools.name: dom
tools.description: Get HTML content of the page or element
